title: tephrosia onobrychoides
intro: Tephrosia onobrychoides, also known as the African milkpea or wild peas, is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Tephrosia onobrychoides include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its ability to lower blood sugar levels and act as a diuretic. Herbal preparations of Tephrosia onobrychoides include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
